body_txt: Commonly referred to as "Flop sweat", this is when a character will break out into an excessive sweat when either nervous or scared. Another term for it is "sweating bullets". Can be associated with a character who is a Nervous Wreck or a Butt-Monkey . May sometimes be accompanied with a Loud Gulp , Awkward Collar Pull , Expressive Squiggle Mouth , or as part of an Oh, Crap! moment. Truth in Television , especially for people with anxiety disorders. Might be caused by Perp Sweating . Contrast: Sweat Drop See also: Briffits and Squeans (where sweat is referred to as "Plewds").
